corrections.text: The article attributes the quote 'With a lean organization and modest seed funding, I am incredibly proud of the rapid progress Engage has made toward a new class of genetic medicines' (Will Olsen, Engage CEO) to Life Science History. The Life Science History page is a brief news aggregation item sourced from BusinessWire and does not contain any direct quotes from Olsen. The quote likely originates from the BusinessWire press release that Life Science History references as its source. The attribution should read 'according to BusinessWire' rather than 'according to Life Science History'.
